SEO_TITLE: Jesús Puertos Portfolio — Full Stack Developer | React, Astro, TypeScript
SEO_DESCRIPTION: Full Stack Developer specialized in React, Astro and TypeScript. Real production projects: tourism, institutional portals and municipal transparency.

EDUCACION.title: TECNM Campus Zongolica
EDUCACION.description: Student of Computer Systems Engineering with a 9.3 GPA. I have built production web platforms for tourism and municipal transparency, and earned recognition in national competitions: 1st place regional HackaTECNM 2024 and 3rd place national HackaTECNM 2025.

EDUCACION.title: Centro Bachillerato Tecnológico Agropecuario No. 280
EDUCACION.description: Graduated as a Office Automation Technician. Acquired knowledge in office tools, system administration and technical support with a 9.0 GPA.

EXPERIENCIA.title: Web Developer · H. Ayuntamiento de Zongolica
EXPERIENCIA.description: Development of digital platforms focused on tourism, institutional information, transparency and interactive experiences for citizens and visitors.
highlights: Tourism portal with dynamic routes, attractions, experiences, events and trip planning
Official institutional portal for H. Ayuntamiento de Zongolica
Contribution to municipal transparency portal for public information access
UX optimization for mobile devices and high-traffic environments
Real-time voting system for Feria 2026 Queens with Supabase Realtime, Google Auth, candidate profiles and live vote table
Deployment and management with Vercel and Cloudflare
AI-assisted development (GPT, Claude, Gemini, NotebookLM) for faster development, debugging and technical documentation

EXPERIENCIA.title: Technical Lead & Documenter · Nexus, HackaTECNM 2025
EXPERIENCIA.description: Technical coordination and structuring of a digital solution for economic development hubs at the national HackaTECNM 2025, earning third place nationally.
highlights: System architecture design for Nexus
Complete technical documentation
Team coordination and key module definition
Third place nationally at HackaTECNM 2025

EXPERIENCIA.title: Logistics Assistant · Heineken CEDIS Tlilapan
EXPERIENCIA.description: Participation in logistics processes and operational analysis in a high-demand environment at Logística Embotelladora del Sur S.A. de C.V.
highlights: Delivery route optimization
Inventory control and auditing
Data analysis for decision making
Work under pressure in real-time operations

EXPERIENCIA.title: AR Developer · HackaTECNM 2024 National Stage (Volvo)
EXPERIENCIA.description: Development of an Augmented Reality application for Volvo Group México at the national InnovaTECNM 2024, representing the Veracruz region in Colima.
highlights: AR app design and implementation for 3D model visualization, rotation and expansion
Distance and dimension measurement tools in immersive environments
Independent visualization of separated 3D components
Performance optimization in AR environment

EXPERIENCIA.title: Full Stack Developer · HackaTECNM 2024 Regional Stage
EXPERIENCIA.description: Development of BeelTraveler, a platform connecting travel agencies with clients and local guides. We earned first place regionally and advanced to the national stage.
highlights: Platform built with Astro, React, Node.js, MySQL and TailwindCSS
First place at the regional stage of HackaTECNM 2024
